summary: Iteration 75: Master SKU LBH/Weight Fields and Pending Fulfillment Firm Fix - All features tested and working. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified.
critical_code_review_comments: LBH (Length, Breadth, Height) and Weight fields properly added to MasterSKUCreate, MasterSKUUpdate, and MasterSKUResponse models
Create Master SKU endpoint (POST /api/master-skus) correctly saves LBH/Weight fields
Update Master SKU endpoint (PATCH /api/master-skus/{id}) correctly updates LBH/Weight fields
Frontend table shows LBH column with format 'LxBxH' and Weight column with 'X kg' format
SKUs without dimensions show 'Not set' in orange color for visibility
Create and Edit dialogs have 'Shipping Dimensions (for Courier Labels)' section with all 4 input fields
Pending Fulfillment firm assignment fix implemented - uses amazon_order.get('firm_id') instead of first active firm
SKU mapping lookup tries firm-specific mapping first, then falls back to global mapping
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test Master SKUs during backend testing (TEST-LBH-* and TEST-NOLBH-*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 75 verified Master SKU LBH/Weight fields feature. The 24V Normal SKU has dimensions set (50x40x30 cm, 25.5 kg). Other SKUs show 'Not set' in orange. Table columns BOM and Aliases were replaced with LBH and Weight columns. Pending Fulfillment firm assignment now correctly uses firm_id from amazon_order.

master_sku_lbh_weight_create.details: POST /api/master-skus accepts and saves length_cm, breadth_cm, height_cm, weight_kg fields

master_sku_lbh_weight_response.details: GET /api/master-skus returns LBH/Weight fields in response

master_sku_table_lbh_column.details: Table shows LBH (cm) column with format 'LxBxH' or 'Not set' in orange

master_sku_table_weight_column.details: Table shows Weight column with format 'X kg' or 'Not set' in orange

master_sku_create_dialog_shipping_sectio.details: Create dialog has 'Shipping Dimensions (for Courier Labels)' section with L/B/H/Weight inputs

master_sku_edit_dialog_shipping_section.details: Edit dialog populates existing LBH/Weight values and allows updates

pending_fulfillment_firm_assignment.details: Firm assignment uses amazon_order.get('firm_id') instead of first active firm

features_verified: LBH (cm) column visible with dimension values or 'Not set'
Weight column visible with kg values or 'Not set'
24V Normal SKU shows 50x40x30 cm and 25.5 kg
Create Master SKU button opens dialog
Edit button opens dialog with existing values
Helper text: 'Used for automatic shipping rate calculation'

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/master-skus: PASSED - Creates SKU with LBH/Weight fields
